hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -e '.subagent_type == "Explore"' > /dev/null 2>&1; then if [ -f docs/patterns.md ]; then echo 'STOP — Read docs/patterns.md BEFORE exploring. Only launch Explore if patterns.md does not cover your need.'; else echo 'No docs/patterns.md found. After exploration, create one with the codebase map.'; fi; fi

if [ -f .claude/session-handoff.md ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"A session handoff file exists at .claude/session-handoff.md from a previous session. Invoke the session-resume skill to read it and present it to the user."}}'; fi
